title: Pull request #7 created for installer banner geometry fix
subtitle: PR documents broken frame issue, adaptive layout solution, URL updates, and regression test coverage
facts: ["Created PR #7 at https://github.com/armelhbobdad/bmad-module-ultracode-goal/pull/7","PR title: \"fix(cli): keep the installer banner frame intact at any terminal width\"","PR documents original issue: 71-character tagline overflowed 70-column usable width, silent padding failure pushed border out of frame","PR documents secondary issue: horizontal rules rendered 2 columns short of box right edge","PR explains solution: content-aware sizing measuring plain text before styling, capped at 76 columns for 80-column terminal fit","PR documents adaptive features: word-wrap for tagline/version on narrow terminals, title row split when composite doesn't fit","PR notes URL updates: Docs to armelhbobdad.github.io/bmad-module-ultracode-goal, Support from Ko-fi to Buy Me a Coffee","PR describes regression coverage: 12 new assertions in test-cli-integration.js at 80/100/60/40 columns validating edge consistency, rule alignment, terminal fit","PR confirms all test suites passing: test:cli, test:install, eslint, prettier"]
narrative: Created pull request #7 to merge the installer banner geometry fix from fix/installer-banner-geometry branch. The PR description provides comprehensive documentation of the issue, solution, and test coverage.

title: Banner geometry fix committed and pushed to fix/installer-banner-geometry branch
subtitle: Commit 502b690 implements adaptive layout, URL updates, and regression test; pushed to origin
facts: ["Dropped stash d0408a1bc073695b4ce0f30b06c98c3dae26bbf4 after verifying duplicate content","Created commit 502b690 with message \"fix(cli): keep the installer banner frame intact at any terminal width\"","Commit includes 101 insertions and 12 deletions across 2 files (test/test-cli-integration.js, tools/cli/lib/ui.js)","Branch fix/installer-banner-geometry pushed to origin with upstream tracking configured","Co-authored by Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context)"]
narrative: Committed and pushed the complete banner geometry fix to the fix/installer-banner-geometry branch. After dropping the duplicate stash (d0408a1b), created commit 502b690 with a comprehensive conventional commit message documenting the entire fix scope.
